evals.prompt: This test is failing after my last change. Please investigate and create a debug report with a patch proposal only. Do not edit source or test files.
evals.expected_output: Creates .lcs/work-items/<timestamp>-<slug-work-item>-debug-ext/debug.md with evidence, reproduction status, ranked hypotheses, no applied changes, patch proposal, regression-test options, cleanup checklist, post-mortem, and Handoff.

evals.prompt: The /api/orders endpoint returns 500 in staging. I have a stack trace and logs. Diagnose why it is failing and propose a fix, but do not apply any code changes.
evals.expected_output: Inspects provided evidence, identifies or requests a lightweight feedback loop, avoids unsupported root-cause claims, and writes debug.md under a -debug-ext work item folder.

evals.prompt: The app sometimes hangs after deploy, maybe flaky. Investigate lightly and make a report. Do not run expensive stress loops unless I ask.
evals.expected_output: Uses optional lightweight repeated checks only, records reproduction confidence, includes ranked hypotheses, instrumentation suggestions with debug prefix cleanup, and offers regression/smoke-test options.
